working_on.task: Fix invalid navigation target path on onboarding page submit
working_on.notes: Fixed route redirection error where the app was trying to navigate to non-existent path '/home/board-game' upon completing onboarding. Replaced it with the correct constant AppRoutes.cashflowBoardGame ('/cashflow-board-game').

recent_changes.description: Fix invalid navigation target on onboarding completion
Configure fallback Google Client IDs in AppConfig and add auth diagnostic logs
Implement Native Google Sign-In flow with google_sign_in and Supabase

decisions_made.reason: Added development Google Web/iOS Client IDs as default values inside AppConfig so local debug builds connect automatically without requiring explicit --dart-define parameters.
Implemented Native Google Sign-In (Option A) using google_sign_in package to provide seamless UX without leaving the app, authentication is completed via signInWithIdToken on Supabase.
Generated release upload-keystore.jks in PKCS12 format, set up key.properties and created fingerprints.txt for safe local credential reference.
